cel.position: foreground-right in near silhouette, larger, facing out toward the sea then half-turning to Hae-won
cel.pose: knees up, arms loosely wrapped around her shins — exactly two hands resting on her own forearms
cel.expression: thoughtful half-smile, mostly read in silhouette

hae-won.position: mid-ground-left, smaller and set back, profile to camera
hae-won.pose: one hand planted on the breakwater, the other resting on her knee — exactly two hands

spatial_rules: dusk silhouettes with depth stagger, Cel nearer/larger
profile axis runs on a diagonal toward the dropping sun
lighting: dusk afterglow, figures near-silhouetted against the orange-red sky
